---
title: "Slides"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "parts/*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: part
  grid-columns: 2
  max-items: 99
  max-description-length: 225
  date-format: medium
  categories: false
  feed: 
    items: 3
    title: Presentation title # TODO: Update the presentation title.
    language: en
---
